c4.S1: majority color = background; filled rectangles (h,w≥4) are solids
c4.S2: for each solid color C, non-solid C cells form a motif mask (bbox)
c4.S3: motif size = (solid_h-2)×(solid_w-2); punch motif-present cells in solid interior to bg (invert stamp)
c4.S4: output = crop covering all solids expanded by one bg frame cell
